zh.Postling, Kent, England, United Kingdom: 英國英格蘭肯特波斯特林
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomasina Lovelace於大約1460年出生在英國薩默塞特金斯頓時，她的父親William John Lovelace26歲，母親Lady Laura Peckham21歲。她於1480年與Thomas Honywood在英國英格蘭肯特肯特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世在英國肯特波斯特林。

zh-hans.Postling, Kent, England, United Kingdom: 英国英格兰肯特波斯特林
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomasina Lovelace于大约1460年出生在英国薩默塞特金斯頓时，她的父亲William John Lovelace26岁，母亲Lady Laura Peckham21岁。她于1480年与Thomas Honywood在英国英格兰肯特肯特结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世在英国肯特波斯特林。

nameMeanings.name: Lovelace
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Loveless  . The spelling is apparently theresult of folk etymology, which understood the word as a nickname fora dandy fond of lace. The modern sense of this word is, however, notattested until the 16th century and at the time of surname formationit meant only ‘cord’ or ‘shoelace’.

variants.name: Loveless
meanings: nickname from Middle English loveles ‘loveless, without love’, probably in the sense ‘fancy free’.
some early examples, such as Richard Lovelas (Kent 1344), may have as their second element Middle English las(se) ‘girl’, ‘maiden’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomasina
meanings: A female name derived from Thomas

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomasina Lovelace was born about 1460, in Kingsdon, Somerset, England, her father, William John Lovelace, was 26 and her mother, Lady Laura Peckham, was 21. She married Thomas Honywood in 1480, in Kent, Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died in Postling, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomasina Lovelace est née environ 1460, à Kingsdon, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, William John Lovelace, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Lady Laura Peckham, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Honywood en 1480, à Kent, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée à Postling, Kent, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomasina Lovelace um 1460 in Kingsdon, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William John Lovelace 26 und ihre Mutter Lady Laura Peckham 21. Sie hat 1480 in Kent, Kent, England, United Kingdom Thomas Honywood geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb in Postling, Kent, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomasina Lovelace è nata il circa 1460 nel Kingsdon, Somerset, England, sua padre, William John Lovelace, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Lady Laura Peckham, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Honywood nel 1480, nel Kent, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel Postling, Kent, England.

ja.Kingsdon, Somerset, England: イギリスソメルセトキングスドン
ja.lifeSummary: Thomasina Lovelaceが約1460年にイギリスソメルセトキングスドンで生まれた時，父William John Lovelaceは26歳，母Lady Laura Peckhamは21歳であった。1480年にイギリスイギリスケントケントでThomas Honywoodと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリスケントポストリングで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomasina Lovelace(이)가 대략 1460년 영국 서머세트 킨그즈던에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William John Lovelace(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Laura Peckham(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1480년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 켄트에서 Thomas Honywood(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 켄트 포스틀링에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomasina Lovelace nasceu aproximadamente 1460, em Kingsdon, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, William John Lovelace, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Lady Laura Peckham, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Honywood em 1480, em Kent, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em Postling, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomasina Lovelace родилась около 1460 г. в местности кингсдон, сомирсет, Англия, её отцу по имени William John Lovelace было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Laura Peckham, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Honywood в 1480 г. в местности кэнт, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в местности постлинг, кэнт, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomasina Lovelace nació aproximadamente 1460, en Kingsdon, Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, William John Lovelace, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Lady Laura Peckham, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Thomas Honywood en 1480, en Kent, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en Postling, Kent, Inglaterra.
